title: A delegation from Sinopec Chemical Sales (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. visited Tianhui Plastics Group
contentHtml: On April 23, the newly appointed President Xiong of Sinopec Chemical Sales (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. led his elite team to visit Tianhui Plastics Group to express his condolences on the recent market fluctuations! The two parties conducted in-depth discussions on the problems existing in the market and operation process after the year, and expressed their willingness to strengthen cooperation, laying a solid foundation for in-depth cooperation in the future.
titleZh: 中石化化工销售（天津）有限公司一行到访天晖塑料集团
contentHtmlZh: 4月23号，中石化化工销售（天津）有限公司新到任熊总率领其精英团队到访天晖塑料集团，就近期行情波动表达慰藉！双方就年后市场，经营过程中存在的问题进行了深入的探讨，并表达加强合作的意愿，为今后深层次合作奠定了坚实的基础。
